visualizerParams.title: Optimizing Median Calculation
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The provided `get_median` function manually handles sorting and even/odd case logic. Refactor it to use Python's built-in `statistics.median` for a more idiomatic and concise implementation.

solution.explanation: By using `statistics.median()`, we improve the code's readability and rely on standard library functions for statistical calculations. It handles both sorting and the logic for even/odd list lengths internally.
